posts.author: adziarmaga (Dziarmaga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be great if Global Admins have the ability to manage Vibe app publishing at the individual user level, rather than being limited to account-wide controls.

What are you trying to achieve

Enable more granular control over publishing permissions, so that access can be tailored to specific users or groups.

posts.author: amichay (Amichay Even Chen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @adziarmaga , thanks for the feedback
Note that you can create a custom account role with vibe publishing permissions and grant it to individual users.
